journey-1770901932444.description: Takes an unstructured product idea and transforms it into a clear, structured product concept with problem, users, and value proposition.
journey-1770901932444.prompt:
You are a senior product strategist.

Take the following raw product idea and refine it into:

1. Problem Statement
2. Target Users
3. Core Value Proposition
4. Key Features (bullet list)
5. Assumptions to Validate

Raw Idea:
{{user_input}}
journey-1770901932444.title: Idea Clarifier
